parties: ACP Shariah Financing GP Limited (Investment Agent / Security Agent)
facility_terms.interest_rate_description: 13% p.a. fixed Murabaha Profit (30/360 day count) + 35% of SPV4 net profits (Relevant Profit Amount), capped at 18% p.a. combined

eligibility_criteria.name: Currency
eligibility_criteria.description: All amounts payable must be denominated in AED

eligibility_criteria.name: Aging Ineligibility
eligibility_criteria.description: Receivables unpaid for 91 days or more after the Invoice Date are deducted from Adjusted Pool Balance

eligibility_criteria.name: Single Receivable Size Cap
eligibility_criteria.description: OPB of any single Eligible Receivable must not exceed 0.5% of aggregate OPB of all Eligible Receivables

eligibility_criteria.name: Per-Debtor Credit Limit
eligibility_criteria.description: OPB owed by a single Eligible Debtor must not exceed USD 15,000,000

eligibility_criteria.name: Services Rendered
eligibility_criteria.description: Healthcare services must have been rendered per the Receivables Contract terms

eligibility_criteria.name: First-Ranking Security
eligibility_criteria.description: Subject to a valid, first-ranking security assignment in favour of the Security Agent, duly perfected

eligibility_criteria.name: Eligible Debtor
eligibility_criteria.description: Debtor must be on the Eligible Debtor List or approved by Investment Agent. Must be UAE-incorporated, not an Affiliate of Parent, not insolvent.

eligibility_criteria.name: No Disputes or Adverse Claims
eligibility_criteria.description: Not subject to any Adverse Claims, Disputes, or outstanding breach

eligibility_criteria.name: Free Assignment
eligibility_criteria.description: Freely assignable without further counterparty consent

eligibility_criteria.name: Arm's Length Transaction
eligibility_criteria.description: On arm's length terms and for full market value

eligibility_criteria.name: Dilution Deduction
eligibility_criteria.description: All Dilutions (defective services, cancellations, setoffs) deducted from Adjusted Pool Balance

eligibility_criteria.name: Dispute Deduction
eligibility_criteria.description: Any amount subject to a Dispute or Adverse Claim deducted from Adjusted Pool Balance

advance_rates.condition: Applied to (Adjusted Pool Balance + Cash Collateral) to compute Borrowing Base
advance_rates.section_ref: MMA Art. 20 — Borrowing Base definition, page 5

covenants.name: PAR30
covenants.section_ref: MMA Art. 18.2(b)(i) — single breach NOT an EoD per 18.3(i)

covenants.name: Collection Ratio
covenants.section_ref: MMA Art. 18.2(c) — 2 consecutive breaches for EoD per 18.3(ii)

covenants.name: Paid vs Due Ratio
covenants.section_ref: MMA Art. 18.2(d) — 2 consecutive breaches for EoD per 18.3(iii)

covenants.name: Weighted Average Life
covenants.section_ref: MMA Art. 21.1 — dual-path: WAL ≤ 70d OR Extended Age (70-90d) ≤ 5% per Art. 21.2

events_of_default.trigger: Failure to pay principal or interest within 5 Business Days of due date (if accidental/technical)
Breach of PAR60 covenant (single breach is EoD)
Breach of Collection Ratio on two or more consecutive Collection Periods
Breach of Paid vs Due Ratio on two or more consecutive Collection Periods
Breach of any other obligation not remedied within 15 Business Days of notice
Any representation or warranty materially incorrect when made or deemed made
Cross-default: default on Financial Indebtedness exceeding USD 500,000
Insolvency proceedings commenced against any Obligor
Creditors' process: attachment/execution over assets exceeding USD 500,000 not discharged within 15 Business Days
Unlawfulness or invalidity of any Finance Document obligation
Cessation of business by any Obligor
Change of Senior Management (Karim Dakki) not replaced with Investment Agent-approved person within 30 days
Change in ownership — Parent ceases to hold 100% of Company shares
Audit qualification on financial statements of any Obligor
Expropriation, seizure, or nationalisation of assets exceeding USD 250,000
Litigation or proceedings against any Obligor involving amounts exceeding USD 500,000
Material Adverse Change affecting the Obligors' ability to perform obligations
Borrowing Base Deficiency not cured within 15 Business Day Remedy Period (after BB Holiday Period)

reporting_requirements.name: Borrowing Base Certificate
reporting_requirements.description: Delivered on the 1st and 15th Business Day of each month, showing eligible receivables, advance rate, and borrowing base calculation

reporting_requirements.name: Borrowing Base Report
reporting_requirements.description: Accompanies the Borrowing Base Certificate with detailed portfolio data

reporting_requirements.name: Compliance Certificate
reporting_requirements.description: Delivered with quarterly financial statements confirming covenant compliance

reporting_requirements.name: Annual Audited Financial Statements
reporting_requirements.description: Audited consolidated financial statements (180 days for FY2025)

reporting_requirements.name: Quarterly Unaudited Financial Statements
reporting_requirements.description: Unaudited balance sheet within 30 days of quarter-end

reporting_requirements.name: Monthly Bank Statements
reporting_requirements.description: Monthly bank statements within 15 Business Days of month-end

reporting_requirements.name: Default Notification
reporting_requirements.description: Prompt notification upon awareness of any Default or Event of Default

reporting_requirements.name: Management Meetings
reporting_requirements.description: Management meetings within 15 days of quarter-end

waterfall_normal.description: Agent fees, costs, and expenses to Investment Agent / Security Agent
Murabaha Profit element of each Deferred Price + other costs/expenses
Cost Price element of each Deferred Price (pro rata)
Any other amounts due to Finance Parties

waterfall_default.description: All outstanding principal and accrued Murabaha Profit

risk_flags.description: Invoice Date and claim submission date may differ for healthcare claims. Documents were originally drafted for real estate and not fully updated. Counsel recommends short amendment letter to formalize Invoice Date = claim submission date for healthcare.
risk_flags.recommendation: Execute amendment letter to align Invoice Date with claim submission date

risk_flags.description: PAR30/PAR60 drafted with 'instalment past due' language but healthcare claims have no formal instalments or contractual due dates. Counsel confirmed PAR should reference debtor-specific expected payment dates, pending formalization.
risk_flags.recommendation: Formalize PAR calculation methodology via amendment letter referencing expected payment dates

risk_flags.description: Monthly Denial Rate is cumulative (stock ratio) but this is not explicitly stated. Currently tested per-purchase which may be cumbersome. Counsel recommends formalizing as a drawstop rather than per-purchase condition.
risk_flags.recommendation: Clarify via amendment that Monthly Denial Rate is cumulative and operates as a drawstop

risk_flags.description: Concentration Limit (a) — single receivable at 10% — is effectively redundant given the 0.5% eligibility gate. Concentration Limit (b) — Top 10 at 50% — is also arguably redundant. Counsel confirmed redundancy.
risk_flags.recommendation: Consider simplifying concentration limits in next amendment to remove redundant thresholds

risk_flags.description: BB Holiday Period of 5 months from agreement date (until ~10 July 2026) during which no BB cure obligation exists. This is a ramp-up provision but should be monitored as the deadline approaches.
risk_flags.recommendation: Monitor BB compliance starting July 2026; ensure portfolio ramp-up meets BB requirements by holiday expiry

definitions.Adjusted Pool Balance: OPB of Eligible Receivables reduced by: (a) OPB breaching Concentration Limits, (b) OPB unpaid 91+ days after Invoice Date, (c) all Dilutions, (d) OPB subject to Dispute or Adverse Claim
definitions.Age: Days elapsed since the claim submission date of a Receivable; zero for Repaid Amounts
definitions.Borrowing Base: (Adjusted Pool Balance + Cash Collateral) x Advance Rate (90%)
definitions.Borrowing Base Holiday Period: 5 months from agreement date (10 Feb 2026 to ~10 Jul 2026)
definitions.Cash Collateral: Funds on deposit in Collection Account constituting principal collections, net of accrued Murabaha Profit, subject to first-ranking security
definitions.Collection Ratio: Collections received in period / OPB at start of period
definitions.Concentration Limits: 5 limits: single receivable 10%, top 10 50%, single customer 10%, single non-eligible debtor 10%, extended age 5%
definitions.Dilution: Reduction/cancellation of receivable due to defective services, contract changes, or setoff — NOT due to inability to pay
definitions.Distributable Profits: Company's accumulated realised profits less accumulated realised losses
definitions.Eligible Debtor: Not Affiliate of Parent; not insolvent; UAE-incorporated; on Eligible Debtor List or approved by Investment Agent
definitions.Extended Age Receivables: Receivables with Age > 70 days but ≤ 90 days
definitions.Monthly Denial Rate: Cumulative denials / total originated (stock ratio). Cap defined in MMA page 17
definitions.Murabaha Profit: CP x PR x (N/360) where PR = 13%
definitions.Net Cash Burn: Net cash from operating activities (excluding working capital changes) minus capex, trailing 90 days
definitions.Outstanding Principal Balance: Unpaid invoice amount net of Collections received and applied to principal
definitions.PAR30: OPB with instalment >30 days past due / OPB of all Eligible Receivables (excl. written-off)
definitions.PAR60: OPB with instalment >60 days past due / OPB of all Eligible Receivables (excl. written-off)
definitions.Paid vs Due: Collections on receivables due in period / Receivables that became due in period
definitions.Relevant Profit Amount: 35% of net profits of Company, capped so that combined with Murabaha Profit does not exceed 18% p.a. of Total Commitments
definitions.Reserved Amount: 15% of Distributable Profits + Relevant Profit Amount (or estimate)
definitions.Weighted Average Life: Sum(OPB_i x Age_i) / Total OPB (all receivables + Repaid Amounts)
